dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses trend-following logic with context-dependent direction. Entry conditions use SMA crossover (5-bar confirmation via ADX > 25 indicating strong trend). Exit conditions implement the 1.5% reversal threshold via price crossing below trend MA, plus 5-bar reversal signal via close crossing MA. Trailing stop conceptualized as SMA(5) breach. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to support both long and short trades based on trend direction. Target regime limited to TRENDING states per signal specification.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses trend-following logic with context-dependent direction. Entry conditions use SMA crossover (5-bar confirmation via ADX > 25 indicating strong trend). Exit conditions implement the 1.5% reversal threshold via price crossing below trend MA, plus 5-bar reversal signal via close crossing MA. Trailing stop conceptualized as SMA(5) breach. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to support both long and short trades based on trend direction. Target regime limited to TRENDING states per signal specification.

source_rule_text: A trader should remain in a position and allow profits to run as long as the identified trend continues in the trader's favor, exiting only when the trend direction shifts.
